    Method
    Description
    private Set<ProcessSystem>
    ProcessModel.getDirtyAreasForNextIteration(ProcessModel.AreaExecutionPlan plan, Set<Object> changedBoundaryStreams)
    Selects areas to rerun using an already resolved area execution plan.

    ProcessModel.isAreaExecutionPlanStale(ProcessModel.AreaExecutionPlan plan)
    Checks whether a cached area execution plan is stale.

    ProcessModel.runAllProcesses(Set<ProcessSystem> runnableAreas, ProcessModel.AreaExecutionPlan areaPlan)
    Runs runnable ProcessSystems using a caller-supplied area execution plan.
